zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Weston於1442年出生在英國素瑞其普斯亞德時，他的父親Sir John Weston18歲，母親Margaret Mitford17歲。他於1480年與Lady Cecilia de Irmingland在英國素瑞其普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Weston于1442年出生在英国素瑞其普斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir John Weston18岁，母亲Margaret Mitford17岁。他于1480年与Lady Cecilia de Irmingland在英国素瑞其普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1490年在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Weston was born in 1442, in Chipstead, Surrey, England, his father, Sir John Weston, was 18 and his mother, Margaret Mitford, was 17. He married Lady Cecilia de Irmingland in 1480, in Chipstead, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1490, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Weston est né en 1442, à Chipstead, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Weston, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mitford, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecilia de Irmingland en 1480, à Chipstead, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1490, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Weston 1442 in Chipstead, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Weston 18 und seine Mutter Margaret Mitford 17. Er hat 1480 in Chipstead, Surrey, England Lady Cecilia de Irmingland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1490 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Westonが1442年にイギリススリーチプステアドで生まれた時，父Sir John Westonは18歳，母Margaret Mitfordは17歳であった。1480年にイギリススリーチプステアドでLady Cecilia de Irminglandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Weston(이)가 1442년 영국 수리 치프스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Weston(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mitford(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 수리 치프스테아드에서 Lady Cecilia de Irmingland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Weston родился в 1442 г. в местности чипстид, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Weston было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mitford, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecilia de Irmingland в 1480 г. в местности чипстид, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1490 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.
